title: Amtech B2320 230mm (9") Cable Cutter
features: DURABLE: This 230mm (9") cable cutter is made from tough, drop forged, heat treated steel for increased durability
COMFORTABLE: The tool has soft grip handles for increased comfort
USES: It is perfect for applications such as high strength cable cutting
MANY APPLICATIONS: It is ideal for securing bicycles, motorcycle helmets, gates and other anti-theft uses
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Cable cutter See more
